note: Day 2C derived-arithmetic focused replay over the 2000-pool. Division and row-level addition obligations + no_aggregation suppression. Live checklist/contract not reconstructed offline (proxy).

case_db56_t52_division.question: Show each department with annual budget per doctor.
case_db56_t52_division.old_selected_sql:
SELECT 
    d.department_name, 
    d.annual_budget, 
    d.doctor_count
FROM departments d
GROUP BY d.department_id
HAVING d.doctor_count > 0
case_db56_t52_division.new_selected_sql:
SELECT department_name, annual_budget, doctor_count, annual_budget * 1.0 / doctor_count AS annual_budget_per_doctor
FROM departments
WHERE doctor_count > 0

case_db57_t62_addition.question: Show each match with total points scored by both teams.
case_db57_t62_addition.old_selected_sql: SELECT "matches"."match_id", "matches"."home_score", "matches"."away_score", SUM("matches"."home_score") AS "home_total", SUM("matches"."away_score") AS "away_total" FROM "matches" GROUP BY "matches"."match_id"
case_db57_t62_addition.new_selected_sql: SELECT match_id, home_score, away_score, (home_score + away_score) AS total_points FROM matches

changes.question: Show each department with its annual budget per enrolled department student.
changes.old_selected_sql: SELECT "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name", "departments"."annual_budget", SUM("programs"."current_enrollment") AS "total_enrolled_students" FROM "departments" INNER JOIN "programs" ON "departments"."department_id" = "programs"."department_id" GROUP BY "departments"."department_id", "departments"."department_name", "departments"."annual_budget"
changes.new_selected_sql:
SELECT department_name, annual_budget, student_count, annual_budget * 1.0 / student_count AS budget_per_student
FROM departments
WHERE student_count > 0
changes.semantic_verdict: wrong_to_correct: projects annual_budget/student_count (budget per enrolled student)

changes.question: Show each instructor with their salary per year of service since the hire date.
changes.old_selected_sql:
SELECT first_name, last_name, salary, hire_date
FROM instructors
changes.new_selected_sql:
SELECT first_name, last_name, salary, hire_date, CAST(salary AS REAL) / (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', hire_date)) AS salary_per_year_of_service
FROM instructors
WHERE strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', hire_date) > 0
changes.semantic_verdict: wrong_to_correct: projects salary / years-of-service (salary per year of service)

changes.question: Show each department with annual budget per doctor.
changes.old_selected_sql:
SELECT 
    d.department_name, 
    d.annual_budget, 
    d.doctor_count
FROM departments d
GROUP BY d.department_id
HAVING d.doctor_count > 0
changes.new_selected_sql:
SELECT department_name, annual_budget, doctor_count, annual_budget * 1.0 / doctor_count AS annual_budget_per_doctor
FROM departments
WHERE doctor_count > 0

changes.question: List policy identifiers that appear either in patient records or billing claims.
changes.old_selected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT "insurance_policies"."policy_id" FROM "billing_claims" INNER JOIN "insurance_policies" ON "billing_claims"."policy_id" = "insurance_policies"."policy_id" INNER JOIN "patients" ON "billing_claims"."patient_id" = "patients"."patient_id"
changes.new_selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT policy_id
FROM insurance_policies
WHERE policy_id IN (SELECT policy_id FROM patients)
   OR policy_id IN (SELECT policy_id FROM billing_claims)

changes.question: List department identifiers that appear either in doctors or appointments.
changes.old_selected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT "doctors"."department_id", "appointments"."department_id" FROM "doctors" INNER JOIN "appointments" ON "doctors"."doctor_id" = "appointments"."doctor_id"
changes.new_selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM doctors
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT department_id FROM appointments
changes.semantic_verdict: wrong_to_correct: UNION of doctors and appointments

changes.question: For each player, calculate average training load divided by average recovery score.
changes.old_selected_sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name, AVG(pts.training_load) / AVG(pts.recovery_score) AS avg_training_load_div_recovery
FROM players p
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name
HAVING AVG(pts.recovery_score) > 0
changes.new_selected_sql:
SELECT p.player_id, p.full_name, AVG(pts.training_load) / AVG(pts.recovery_score) AS avg_training_load_div_recovery
FROM players p
JOIN player_training_stats pts ON p.player_id = pts.player_id
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.full_name
HAVING AVG(pts.recovery_score) > 0

changes.question: Show each match with total points scored by both teams.
changes.old_selected_sql: SELECT "matches"."match_id", "matches"."home_score", "matches"."away_score", SUM("matches"."home_score") AS "home_total", SUM("matches"."away_score") AS "away_total" FROM "matches" GROUP BY "matches"."match_id"
changes.new_selected_sql: SELECT match_id, home_score, away_score, (home_score + away_score) AS total_points FROM matches

changes.question: List team identifiers that appear either in contracts or transfers.
changes.old_selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id OR t.team_id = tr.from_team_id
changes.new_selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN contracts c ON t.team_id = c.team_id
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.from_team_id
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_id
FROM teams t
JOIN transfers tr ON t.team_id = tr.to_team_id
changes.semantic_verdict: wrong_to_correct: teams JOIN contracts UNION teams JOIN transfers
